allow: PowerShell($env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr"; Set-Location "D:\\Harnie\\App v2"; .\\gradlew.bat compileDebugKotlin 2>&1 | Out-String)
PowerShell($env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr"; Set-Location "D:\\Harnie\\App v2"; .\\gradlew.bat clean 2>&1 | Out-String)
PowerShell($env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr"; Set-Location "D:\\Harnie\\App v2"; .\\gradlew.bat assembleDebug 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell($g = \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($g\){ git --version } else { "git NOT installed" }; $gh = \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($gh\){ gh --version } else { "gh NOT installed" })

PowerShell($dirs = @\("app","gradle","release","supabase","build",".gradle",".idea",".kotlin"\); foreach\($d in $dirs\){ $p = "D:\\Harnie\\App v2\\$d"; if\(Test-Path $p\){ $size = \(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB; "{0,-12} {1,8:N1} MB" -f $d, $size } })

PowerShell("=== app subdirs ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force "D:\\Harnie\\App v2\\app" | Select-Object Name,Mode; "=== release ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force -Recurse "D:\\Harnie\\App v2\\release" | Select-Object FullName,@{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; "=== app/build MB ==="; if\(Test-Path "D:\\Harnie\\App v2\\app\\build"\){ [math]::Round\(\(Get-ChildItem "D:\\Harnie\\App v2\\app\\build" -Recurse -File | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB,1\) })
PowerShell(cd "D:\\Harnie\\App v2"; git status -sb; "---"; "Commits en remoto:"; git log origin/main --oneline; "---"; "Archivos rastreados: " + \(git ls-files | Measure-Object\).Count)
